_meta.titus_model: PAR/PXP/PMR (flush face) / PXP-DR/PDR (drop face) -- Perforated Face return diffuser series
_meta.source_cutsheet: perforatedperf_diffusers_2017.pdf, user-supplied from C:\Users\Colin Nolan\Downloads\, page F87 ("PAR, PXP, PMR, PXP-DR, PDR PERFORMANCE DATA", FLUSH FACE - RETURN / DROP FACE - RETURN)
_meta.raw_data_reference: Full raw cfm/NC table for every published row (both round Dia. and square Neck options, all 3 face sizes plus Other Sizes substitutes) saved separately as RG-1_perforated_ceiling_return_RAW_DATA.csv for manual review.
_meta.SUPERSEDED_2026-07-24: An earlier version of this family (same day) used an NC<15-driven cascade for 24x24 (which has rich real per-diameter NC data) and a substitute square-neck row for 18x18's Sizing Warning ceiling. User reviewed the raw data directly and found the 18x18 estimate (900 cfm, from an unrelated big square neck) looked too high and unreliable. User's decision: abandon NC-based sizing entirely for this family and use PURE 600 FPM velocity sizing for all three Types instead -- this is the CURRENT, live approach.
_meta.why_pure_velocity_works_here: Cross-validated earlier that computed velocity-sizing (area x 600fpm) matches the cutsheet's own 600fpm column values exactly for every diameter where real data exists (e.g. 12in dia -> 471 cfm appears in both). Because it's pure geometry (not tied to NC, which varies by face size), the SAME breakpoint set now applies to all three Types -- only the per-Type diameter CEILING differs (limited by how big a round duct can physically fit within each face size).

breakpoints_shared_across_all_types.note: only reachable by the 24x24 Type; 12x12 and 18x18 cap out earlier, see per-type ceilings below

12x12.rationale: assistant's engineering judgment - roughly 1in clearance each side of the 12in face, not independently confirmed by user

18x18.rationale: same rationale, 1in clearance each side of the 18in face

24x24.rationale: same rationale, 1in clearance each side of the 24in face

_meta.family_parameters: Flow (instance), Duct Diameter (instance, formula below), Duct Radius (instance, pre-existing formula Duct Diameter/2, untouched), Diffuser Width/Height (TYPE, discriminator, 12x12/18x18/24x24 -> 1'/1.5'/2'), Sizing Warning (instance, Text), Line length and Total Pressure (instance, pre-existing, untouched, unrelated to sizing).
_meta.verified: 17 boundary test cases (regenerate-and-read) across all 3 Types and all breakpoints including per-type ceilings, all pass -- 2026-07-24.

sizing_warning_formula: IF(Diffuser Width < 15", IF(Flow > 327, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 327 CFM FOR 12X12 (10 IN MAX NECK)", ""), IF(Diffuser Width < 21", IF(Flow > 838, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 838 CFM FOR 18X18 (16 IN MAX NECK)", ""), IF(Flow > 1584, "OVER CAPACITY - MAX 1584 CFM FOR 24X24 (22 IN MAX NECK)", "")))
